title: gonolobus prostratus
intro: Gonolobus prostratus, also known as the Mexican milkflower, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gonolobus prostratus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat these health concerns.
